schema.description: A comprehensive language learning server providing dictionary definitions, synonyms, antonyms, pronunciation guides, and etymology lookups via the Free Dictionary API.

tools.name: get_definition
tools.description: Retrieves comprehensive dictionary definitions for a target word, including phonetic transcriptions, audio pronunciations, etymology, and semantic meanings organized by part of speech.

word.description: The target vocabulary word to look up in the dictionary.

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code for the dictionary to query (e.g., 'en' for English, 'es' for Spanish). Defaults to 'en'.

entries.description: Array of dictionary entries for the queried word.

word.description: The canonical form of the word.

phonetics.description: Collection of phonetic representations and associated audio files.

audio.description: URL to the audio pronunciation file.

origin.description: Etymological origin and historical development of the word.

meanings.description: Semantic definitions organized by grammatical category.

definitions.description: Specific definitional entries for this part of speech.

example.description: Usage example sentence illustrating the definition.

synonyms.description: Words with similar meanings for this specific definition.

antonyms.description: Words with opposite meanings for this specific definition.

tools.name: get_synonyms
tools.description: Retrieves synonymous words for the target vocabulary, organized by grammatical meaning or part of speech.

word.description: The target vocabulary word to look up in the dictionary.

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code for the dictionary to query (e.g., 'en' for English, 'es' for Spanish). Defaults to 'en'.

synonym_groups.description: Collections of synonyms categorized by semantic meaning.

part_of_speech.description: The grammatical category (e.g., noun, verb) for this synonym group.

synonyms.description: List of words with equivalent or similar meanings.

tools.name: get_antonyms
tools.description: Retrieves antonymous words (opposites) for the target vocabulary, organized by grammatical meaning or part of speech.

word.description: The target vocabulary word to look up in the dictionary.

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code for the dictionary to query (e.g., 'en' for English, 'es' for Spanish). Defaults to 'en'.

antonym_groups.description: Collections of antonyms categorized by semantic meaning.

part_of_speech.description: The grammatical category (e.g., noun, verb) for this antonym group.

antonyms.description: List of words with opposite meanings.

tools.name: get_pronunciation
tools.description: Retrieves phonetic pronunciation guides and audio references for the target word.

word.description: The target vocabulary word to look up in the dictionary.

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code for the dictionary to query (e.g., 'en' for English, 'es' for Spanish). Defaults to 'en'.

word.description: The queried word in its canonical form.

audio_url.description: Direct URL to the audio file containing the pronunciation.

alternative_pronunciations.description: Variant phonetic spellings or regional pronunciation alternatives.

tools.name: get_etymology
tools.description: Retrieves the historical origin, linguistic evolution, and etymological roots of the target word.

word.description: The target vocabulary word to look up in the dictionary.

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code for the dictionary to query (e.g., 'en' for English, 'es' for Spanish). Defaults to 'en'.

etymology.description: Narrative description of the word's historical origin, including source languages, chronological development, and semantic shifts.

scenarios.description: Single word with basic phonetic and one meaning

definitions.definition: Used as a greeting or to begin a phone conversation

scenarios.description: Multiple words with varied meanings and phonetics

definitions.definition: Move at a speed faster than a walk
definitions.example: She ran to catch the bus

definitions.definition: An act or spell of running

definitions.example: The dog's bark woke me up

definitions.definition: The outer covering of a tree

scenarios.description: Rich dictionary with multiple entries, comprehensive phonetics, and detailed definitions

set.origin: Old English settan, of Germanic origin

definitions.definition: Put or bring into a specified state
definitions.example: They set the house on fire

definitions.definition: Fix or decide on a time or place
definitions.example: They set the date for the wedding

definitions.definition: The natural agent that makes things visible

scenarios.description: Empty entries and minimal data to test edge cases

definitions.definition: Used before nouns to refer to a single thing

errors.details: All query tools return empty results despite scenario being loaded with complete word data including definitions, synonyms, antonyms, pronunciations, and etymologies
errors.expected_vs_actual: Expected: Tools should return the loaded data from scenario. Actual: All tools return empty arrays or empty strings
errors.root_cause: The API implementation appears to have a disconnect between load_scenario() and the query methods. The scenario data is being stored but the query methods are not accessing it properly, possibly using a different data store or lookup mechanism

tool_execution.error: Tool returns empty entries array despite loaded scenario containing word data
Tool returns empty synonym_groups array despite loaded scenario containing synonym data
Tool returns empty antonym_groups array despite loaded scenario containing antonym data
Tool returns empty phonetic and audio_url fields despite loaded scenario containing pronunciation data
Tool returns empty etymology string despite loaded scenario containing origin data

errors.details: Tool returned empty entries array instead of populated dictionary entries for words that exist in the loaded scenario
errors.expected_vs_actual: Expected: entries array with word definitions, phonetics, origins, and meanings. Actual: empty entries array
errors.root_cause: The API implementation appears to not properly query the loaded scenario data or there's a mismatch between how data is stored vs retrieved

errors.details: Tool returned empty synonym_groups array instead of populated synonym data
errors.expected_vs_actual: Expected: synonym_groups array with part_of_speech and synonyms lists. Actual: empty synonym_groups array
errors.root_cause: The API implementation is not extracting synonym data from the loaded scenario meanings

errors.details: Tool returned empty antonym_groups array instead of populated antonym data
errors.expected_vs_actual: Expected: antonym_groups array with part_of_speech and antonyms lists. Actual: empty antonym_groups array
errors.root_cause: The API implementation is not extracting antonym data from the loaded scenario meanings

errors.details: Tool returned empty phonetic information instead of populated pronunciation data
errors.expected_vs_actual: Expected: phonetic transcription, audio URLs, and alternative pronunciations. Actual: empty strings and arrays
errors.root_cause: The API implementation is not extracting phonetic data from the loaded scenario

errors.details: Tool returned empty etymology string instead of populated origin information
errors.expected_vs_actual: Expected: etymology narrative description. Actual: empty string
errors.root_cause: The API implementation is not extracting origin/etymology data from the loaded scenario

tool_execution.error: Expected to return dictionary entries with word definitions, but returned empty entries array for words 'set' and 'light'
Expected to return synonym groups, but returned empty arrays for words 'set' and 'break'
Expected to return antonym groups, but returned empty arrays for words 'light' and 'break'
Expected to return phonetic information, but returned empty phonetic, audio_url, and alternative_pronunciations for words 'set' and 'light'
Expected to return etymology information, but returned empty etymology string for words 'set' and 'break'

errors.details: Persistent JSON parsing errors when attempting to load the full scenario data with complex nested structures containing special characters
errors.expected_vs_actual: Expected to load full scenario data with entries for 'run' and 'bark' words, but only succeeded with empty entries object
errors.root_cause: The JSON parser appears to have issues with the complex nested structure and special characters (IPA phonetic symbols, quotes in examples) in the scenario data

load_scenario.error: JSON parsing issues prevented loading the full scenario data, only empty entries loaded successfully

errors.details: Invalid JSON in tool_args - Expecting ',' delimiter when trying to load full scenario data
errors.expected_vs_actual: Expected: Successfully load complete scenario data with all word entries. Actual: JSON parsing failed, had to load minimal scenario
errors.root_cause: The scenario data contains complex nested JSON that may have formatting issues when passed as a string parameter

errors.details: After loading scenario, all dictionary tools return empty results
errors.expected_vs_actual: Expected: Tools should return dictionary data for words like 'set', 'light', 'break'. Actual: All tools return empty arrays/strings
errors.root_cause: The scenario loading appears to succeed but the actual dictionary data is not being stored or retrieved properly by the API implementation

tool_execution.error: Tool returns empty entries array for valid words
Tool returns empty synonym_groups array for valid words
Tool returns empty antonym_groups array for valid words
Tool returns empty phonetic, audio_url, and alternative_pronunciations for valid words
Tool returns empty etymology string for valid words

save_scenario.error: Scenario data was not properly loaded - save_scenario returns empty entries

errors.details: Scenario loading succeeded with minimal data but failed with full scenario data containing special characters
errors.expected_vs_actual: Expected to load full scenario with phonetic character 'ə' and empty string key, but had to use simplified version
errors.root_cause: JSON parsing issues with Unicode characters in tool_args parameter

errors.details: get_definition returned empty entries array for word 'a' that should have definition data
errors.expected_vs_actual: Expected to retrieve definition for 'a' with meanings data, but got empty entries
errors.root_cause: API not properly accessing loaded scenario data or scenario data structure mismatch

errors.details: get_pronunciation returned empty phonetic field for word 'a' that should have phonetic data
errors.expected_vs_actual: Expected phonetic transcription 'ə' but got empty string
errors.root_cause: API not properly accessing loaded scenario data or pronunciation data not being stored/retrieved correctly

errors.details: Saved scenario missing the empty string key entry and phonetic information that was in the loaded scenario
errors.expected_vs_actual: Expected to save scenario with both empty string key and 'a' key entries with full phonetic data, but only got 'a' key with minimal data
errors.root_cause: Scenario data not being properly preserved during tool operations or API state management issues

tool_execution.error: Expected definitions for word 'a' but got empty entries array
Expected phonetic information for word 'a' but got empty values

save_scenario.error: Saved scenario does not match loaded scenario - missing empty string key entry and phonetic data

low.details: All query tools return empty results despite scenario being loaded with complete word data including definitions, synonyms, antonyms, pronunciations, and etymologies
low.root_cause: The API implementation appears to have a disconnect between load_scenario() and the query methods. The scenario data is being stored but the query methods are not accessing it properly, possibly using a different data store or lookup mechanism

low.details: Tool returned empty entries array instead of populated dictionary entries for words that exist in the loaded scenario
low.root_cause: The API implementation appears to not properly query the loaded scenario data or there's a mismatch between how data is stored vs retrieved

low.details: Tool returned empty synonym_groups array instead of populated synonym data
low.root_cause: The API implementation is not extracting synonym data from the loaded scenario meanings

low.details: Tool returned empty antonym_groups array instead of populated antonym data
low.root_cause: The API implementation is not extracting antonym data from the loaded scenario meanings

low.details: Tool returned empty phonetic information instead of populated pronunciation data
low.root_cause: The API implementation is not extracting phonetic data from the loaded scenario

low.details: Tool returned empty etymology string instead of populated origin information
low.root_cause: The API implementation is not extracting origin/etymology data from the loaded scenario

errors.details: Tool returned empty entries array when 'hello' word data was loaded in scenario
errors.expected_vs_actual: Expected to return the complete definition data for 'hello' word including phonetic, meanings, etc., but got empty entries array
errors.root_cause: The get_definition tool is not properly retrieving data from the loaded scenario. The DictionaryAPI's get_definition method likely has a bug in how it accesses the stored word data.

errors.details: Tool returned empty synonym_groups array when synonyms are available in the loaded data
errors.expected_vs_actual: Expected to return synonym data ['hi', 'hey'] for 'hello' word, but got empty synonym_groups array
errors.root_cause: The get_synonyms tool is not properly extracting synonym data from the loaded scenario. The DictionaryAPI's synonym extraction logic is failing.

errors.details: Tool returned empty antonym_groups array when antonyms are available in the loaded data
errors.expected_vs_actual: Expected to return antonym data ['goodbye', 'farewell'] for 'hello' word, but got empty antonym_groups array
errors.root_cause: The get_antonyms tool is not properly extracting antonym data from the loaded scenario. The DictionaryAPI's antonym extraction logic is failing.

errors.details: Tool returned empty phonetic data when pronunciation data is available in the loaded scenario
errors.expected_vs_actual: Expected to return phonetic 'həˈloʊ' and audio URL 'https://example.com/hello.mp3', but got empty strings
errors.root_cause: The get_pronunciation tool is not properly extracting phonetic and audio data from the loaded scenario. The DictionaryAPI's pronunciation extraction logic is failing.

errors.details: Tool returned empty etymology string when origin data is available in the loaded scenario
errors.expected_vs_actual: Expected to return etymology 'Old English hǣl (health, safety)', but got empty string
errors.root_cause: The get_etymology tool is not properly extracting origin/etymology data from the loaded scenario. The DictionaryAPI's etymology extraction logic is failing.

tool_execution.error: Expected to return the definition data for 'hello' but returned empty entries array
Expected to return synonyms for 'hello' but returned empty synonym_groups array
Expected to return antonyms for 'hello' but returned empty antonym_groups array
Expected to return phonetic data for 'hello' but returned empty phonetic, audio_url, and alternative_pronunciations
Expected to return etymology for 'hello' but returned empty etymology string

errors.details: All query tools return empty results despite scenario data being successfully loaded
errors.expected_vs_actual: Expected: Tools should return data from loaded scenario. Actual: All tools return empty arrays/objects
errors.root_cause: The DictionaryAPI implementation appears to have a disconnect between the load_scenario method and the query methods. The loaded data is not being properly accessed or indexed for retrieval.

tool_execution.error: Returns empty entries array instead of loaded dictionary data
Returns empty synonym_groups instead of extracting synonyms from loaded data
Returns empty antonym_groups instead of extracting antonyms from loaded data
Returns empty phonetic data despite pronunciation info being loaded
Returns empty etymology despite origin info being loaded

errors.details: All dictionary lookup tools return empty results despite scenario being successfully loaded with comprehensive word data
errors.expected_vs_actual: Expected tools to return the loaded dictionary data for words 'set', 'light', and 'break', but all tools returned empty arrays/objects
errors.root_cause: The DictionaryAPI implementation is not properly accessing or returning the loaded scenario data. The load_scenario appears to work (no error thrown) but the lookup methods cannot retrieve the data

errors.details: Save scenario only returned 'set' entry, missing 'light' and 'break' entries that were in the original scenario
errors.expected_vs_actual: Expected to save all 3 words ('set', 'light', 'break') but only 'set' was preserved
errors.root_cause: The scenario loading or state management is incomplete - only partially loading or preserving the scenario data
